title: [MTR3/4] Class 357 Electrostar Pack
description: Class 357 Electrostar in c2c, c2c Refurbished, c2c Metallic Blue, East Thames Trains, Great British Railways and c2c Low Emissions liveries for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# **About**
The **British Rail Class 357 _Electrostar_** is a class of alternating current (AC) electric multiple unit (EMU) passenger train built by Adtranz until 2001, later Bombardier, at Derby Litchurch Lane Works between 1999 and 2002. They were delivered in two batches at a cost of approximately £292 million.

# **Function**
This resource pack adds new variants of Class 357 _Electrostar_ trains via the MTR mod in c2c, c2c refurbished, c2c Metallic Blue, Great British Railways and c2c Low Emissions liveries.

**Note to the user: The Quiet Zone carriages within this resource pack are designed for MTR4 use, similar to their real-life counterparts, but can also be used with MTR3.**
